# AICSSYC 2026

> The All India Computer Society Student & Young Professional Congress 2026 — IEEE Computer Society SYP flagship at SRM IST, Kattankulathur, October 8–11, 2026. Theme: Where Agents Meet Humans.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, speakers, agenda, passes, sponsors, FAQ and contact for AICSSYC 2026.
